apis.name: @ohos.geoLocationManager (位置服务)
apis.purpose: 提供GNSS定位、网络定位、地理编码/逆地理编码、国家码查询和地理围栏等核心位置服务能力

apis.name: @ohos.app.ability.FenceExtensionAbility (FenceExtensionAbility)
apis.purpose: 为开发者提供地理围栏事件的后台回调扩展能力，继承自ExtensionAbility，可接收围栏状态变化和销毁事件

apis.name: @ohos.app.ability.FenceExtensionContext (FenceExtensionContext)
apis.purpose: FenceExtensionAbility的上下文环境，继承自ExtensionContext，提供FenceExtensionAbility的相关配置信息

notableFindings: All coordinates are in WGS-84 coordinate system only; GCJ-02 is available for geofence coordinate types via CoordinateSystemType enum
FenceExtensionAbility requires API 14+ and Stage model only, imported from '@kit.LocationKit' not '@kit.AbilityKit'
GNSS geofence callback can use either in-process callback or FenceExtensionAbility background wakeup via fenceExtensionAbilityName
Beacon fences (API 20+) are managed separately with a max of 10 per app, while GNSS geofences max at 100 per app
Bluetooth scan for location (API 16+) requires mail application to locationkit@huawei.com for approval
